channel.title: Arcane City Events - Next 14 Days
channel.description: Upcoming Arcane City events from 2026-06-16 through the next 14 days.

item.title: [06/16] Real Shocks / United Stare / Clobberin' Time @ Ormsby Cafe
item.description:
Justin's 40th Birthday Show featuring Real Shocks, United Stare, and Clobberin' Time at the Ormsby Basement.

Venue: Ormsby Cafe

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/17] Infinity Song @ Spirit
item.description:
NYC soft rock sibling band Infinity Song brings the World Tour II Continues? run to Spirit on June 17.

Venue: Spirit

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/17] Haikunika with Millie Dread and Swampwalk @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Sophisticated synthpop from Spain's Haikunika headlines with special guests Millie Dread and Swampwalk at Poetry Lounge in Millvale.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/17] Dad's Backyard presents Swamp Rats (DE) at Color Park! @ Color Park! at Color Park
item.description:
Swamp Rat with local support from Reliable Child, Josie Harrow and Uncle AL

Venue: Color Park! at Color Park

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/17] The Playful Bunch, Virusse, Sucker, Calluna @ Brillobox
item.description:
A multi-band indie/experimental showcase at Brillobox featuring Virusse, Sucker, and Calluna.

Venue: Brillobox

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/18] Bustié (NYC), Lilac//Web, DJ Pancakes @ Rock Room
item.description:
Anarcho body music and socio political dance night with Bustié, Lilac//Web and DJ Pancakes.

Venue: Rock Room

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/18] smokedope2016: The Comedown Tour @ Spirit
item.description:
smokedope2016 with GHOSTFACEKUSH and BARTESIANWATER at Spirit Hall.

Venue: Spirit

item.title: [06/18] Sun Not Yellow, Draft & M.E.L.T. @ Poetry Lounge
item.description:
Draft and M.E.L.T. bring the Sun Not Yellow Tour 2026 to Poetry Lounge in Pittsburgh.

Venue: Poetry Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/18] Brewery Sessions: NFD & PVKVSV @ Jackworth Ginger Beer
item.description:
a free dj night featuring NFD and PVKVSV at a Pittsburgh brewery, running 7PM to midnight.

Venue: Jackworth Ginger Beer

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/18] American Tune: Simon, Croce & Taylor @ City Winery
item.description:
An evening of Paul Simon, Jim Croce &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; James Taylor songs &amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp;amp; stories

Venue: City Winery

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/18] ZOOT: John Shannon Trio @ Bottlerocket Social Hall
item.description:
A comedy and jazz showcase featuring the John Shannon Trio, hosted by Senneca Stone at Bottlerocket Social Hall.

Venue: Bottlerocket Social Hall

View event on Arcane City

item.description:
Deakin performs live at Spirit Lodge with support from Vireo and visual projections by Johnny Arlett.

Venue: Spirit

item.description:

Venue: Hop Farm Brewing Company

item.title: [06/19] Live in The Lobby: DR. KARAMELOV b2b Lefafa @ Field Day
item.description:
DR. KARAMELOV and Lefafa go back-to-back for a Friday night DJ set at The Lobby Bar.

item.description:

item.description:
Algernon Cadwallader headlines at Thunderbird in Pittsburgh with Heart Attack Man and Holidays in United States.

Venue: Thunderbird

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/19] The Living End Screening @ The Soft Spot
item.description:
Gregg Araki's seminal queer classic! Two HIV-positive young men — a semi-employed film critic and a hot hustler — tear off on a cross-country crime spree.

Venue: The Soft Spot

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/19] Dark Room w/ B-Czar @ Side Quest
item.description:
monthly night of eclectic dark music in the goth and industrial zones

Venue: Side Quest

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/19] Freaknik 96 @ Spirit
item.description:
A Juneteenth celebration club night with DJ Love, Huny XO, and Manny Dibiachi running 9pm to 2am.

Venue: Spirit

item.description:
A Juneteenth club night celebration featuring DJ Femi, Huny XO, and Yamez.

Venue: Spirit

item.title: [06/20] Pittsburgh Pride in the Pit @ Mr. Smalls
item.description:
An all-ages Pride punk/hardcore showcase at Mr. Small's Funhouse featuring eight performers and emceed by Zelda Kollins and Brie Griffith.

Venue: Mr. Smalls

item.title: [06/20] Hardcore Matinee @ Cousins Lounge
item.description:
An all-ages hardcore matinee show featuring Brick Shot, Moemaw Naedon, Cultivator, Cold Call, and Neckdarit at Cousins Lounge in Millvale, PA.

Venue: Cousins Lounge

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/20] Litha @ Club Pittsburgh
item.description:
A 14-hour solstice rave presented by Everdark x Heaven featuring Jellyfish with 15 DJs across two stages at Club Pittsburgh.

Venue: Club Pittsburgh

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/20] Mt Oliver Juneteenth Block Party @ Ask a punk
item.description:
A Juneteenth celebration block party in Mt. Oliver featuring live music, a Black Wall Streetwear Market, street fashion show, and 40+ local vendors.

Venue: Ask a punk

View event on Arcane City

item.title: [06/20] PONY UP: JADED Year of the Fire Horse Celebration @ Tree Pittsburgh
item.description:
PONY UP is a festival celebrating the Year of the Horse, along the Allegheny River ft. performances from LEXCD, FORMOSA, Viii Dorsey and more.

Venue: Tree Pittsburgh
